titleStmt.title: SII 24.482: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 482. (A.R. No. 60 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records the gift of the village Āḍippuliyūr in Ōgaimāgāṇi, a sub-division in Āyppāḍi-śīrmai, included in Tañjāvūr-uśāvaḍi in Śōḻa-maṇḍalam as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam for offerings to god Śrīraṅganātha, by Rāyasam Veṅkaṭa •••, son of Guṇḍamarāja Timmapparāja of Āruvēlu community. The details of date viz. Śaka 1484, Dundubhi, Karkaṭaka, ba. 11, Saturday, Rōhiṇī, regularly correspond to 1562, A.D. July 25, Saturday, ·78; ·68.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu [.4] svasti śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvira pratāpa śrī virasadāśivarāyamahārāyar pṛthvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 4 Itaṉ mel cellā niṉṟa tu[ ntupi samva] tsarattu karkkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu deśamiyum man=ta vāramum peṟṟa �hiṇi nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟā vitivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅgan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha devar śrīpaṇṭārattukku harita gotrattu
Āpastambasūtrattu Āṟuvelu śreṣṭharāna guṇḍamarāja ttimmarājāvin putran rāyasam veṅkaṭa deṇḍam samarppin=tu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Eṉṉuṭaiya Ubhayamāka perumāḷ śrīraṅga nāthadevar Amutu ceytaruḷum Avasarak kaṭṭaḷai nāḷ 1- kku Amutu ceytaruḷum campāttaḷikai 4kku Amutupaṭi kaṟiyamutu ney Amutu campāram Uṭpaṭaṟepresented by the shortened form uṭṭataḷikai 1- kku pu5 Āka varuṣam 1kku nāḷ 3 100 6 10 5 kku poṉ 100 6ý nāḷ 1kku cātti Aruḷum cantaṉappaṭi (1/2) Āka varuṣam 1- kku
poṉ 100 5 10kku tiruviṭai Āṭṭamāka cetta coḻamaṇṭalam tañcāvūr Ucāvaṭikku cellum Āyppāṭi cīrmai Okai mākāṇiyil Āṭippuliyūr kiṟāmam 1- kku nāṉ kellaikkuṭ paṭṭa Arakkuppaṭi pramāṇam nañcey nilam 2 10 4 3ýkkum puñcey 5 3(1/4)nya kkum nattam ceyttalait tiṭar māvakai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭaiyum sakala samutāya prāptiyum Uṭpaṭaṟepresented by the shortened form uṭṭavaruṣam 1- kku rekaippaṭi . poṉ 100 5 10 Inta poṉ nūṟṟaiṉpatuk kum Inta poliyūṭṭu
k kaṭṭaḷai Inta graāmattil Utaiyam koṇṭe cantrādityavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭa vatākavum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭun nālat toṉṟum nāṉe peṟṟuvarak kaṭavaṉākavum Inta śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku kovil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇa priyan Eḻuttu dānapālanayormmaddhye dānāt śreyonu pālanam dānāt svargamavāpnoti pālanā daccutam padam .
Digital edition of SII 24.482 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
